## Problem

What limitation or gap are you encountering?

## Proposed solution

How would you like OpenLedger to behave?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you thought about?

## Privacy or self-hosting notes

Does this change affect the local-first model or self-hosting capabilities?
